name: Chloropseidae
description: Leafbirds are a family of brightly colored passerine birds found in tropical forests of South and Southeast Asia. They are named for their green plumage, which camouflages them among the foliage as they forage for insects and fruit.

children.name: Chloropsis
children.description: A genus of brilliantly green, warbler-like birds with blue, yellow, or orange facial markings, found across tropical Asia.

children.name: Chloropsis aurifrons
children.description: The Golden-fronted Leafbird has bright green plumage with an orange-gold forehead and a blue throat patch in males. It inhabits forests and gardens from India to Sumatra, feeding on nectar, fruit, and insects.

children.name: Chloropsis cochinchinensis
children.description: The Blue-winged Leafbird is green with blue wing patches and a blue throat bordered by black in males. It forages in the canopy of lowland and hill forests across Southeast Asia.

children.name: Chloropsis sonnerati
children.description: The Greater Green Leafbird is the largest leafbird, with entirely green plumage and a black throat in males. It inhabits lowland rainforests in Southeast Asia and Indonesia.

children.name: Chloropsis hardwickii
children.description: The Orange-bellied Leafbird has green upperparts, a bright orange belly, and a blue throat in males. It is found in montane forests from the Himalayas to Indochina and southern China.

children.name: Chloropsis cyanopogon
children.description: A small green leafbird found in the Malay Peninsula, Sumatra, and Borneo.

children.name: Chloropsis media
children.description: A leafbird endemic to the Philippines.

children.name: Chloropsis palawanensis
children.description: A leafbird endemic to Palawan in the Philippines.

children.name: Chloropsis flavipennis
children.description: A leafbird with yellow wings, endemic to the Philippines.

children.name: Chloropsis venusta
children.description: A leafbird with blue mask, endemic to Sumatra.

children.name: Chloropsis moluccensis
children.description: A leafbird with blue wings, found in Southeast Asia.

children.name: Chloropsis zosterops
children.description: Chloropsis zosterops (Javan Leafbird) is a leafbirds species found in Asia region.
